zh.lifeSummary: Richarde Maing於大約1155年出生。她和Gillis I Trith至少有1個兒子。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Richarde Maing于大约1155年出生。她和Gillis I Trith至少有1个儿子。

nameMeanings.name: Maing
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Burmese: from a personal name usually forming part of a compound name, from naing ‘to overcome’. — Note: Since Burmese do not have hereditary surnames, this name was registered as such only after immigration of its bearers to the US.

nameMeanings.name: Richarde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: Richarde Maing was born about 1155. She had at least 1 son with Gillis I Trith.

fr.lifeSummary: Richarde Maing est née environ 1155. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec Gillis I Trith.

de.lifeSummary: Richarde Maing wurde um 1155 geboren. Sie hatte mit Gillis I Trith mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: Richarde Maing è nata il circa 1155. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio con Gillis I Trith.

ja.lifeSummary: Richarde Maingは約1155年に生まれた。彼女はGillis I Trithとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Richarde Maing(은)는 대략 1155년 태어났다. 그녀는 Gillis I Trith(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Richarde Maing nasceu aproximadamente 1155. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho com Gillis I Trith.

ru.lifeSummary: Richarde Maing родилась около 1155 г. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от Gillis I Trith.

es.lifeSummary: Richarde Maing nació aproximadamente 1155. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Gillis I Trith.
